title: Confirm physical LilyGO T-Deck revision before hardware smoke
description: Why this exists: public sources distinguish T-Deck, T-Deck Plus, T-Deck Pro, and Pro v1.1 variants, and the user has physical T-Deck hardware but the exact marking/revision has not been captured in repo evidence. What needs to be done: record board photos or markings, confirm whether it is standard T-Deck versus Plus/Pro, capture USB VID/PID and boot log, and update board/overlay assumptions if the physical unit is not standard T-Deck. Acceptance criteria: exact physical revision is recorded with evidence; any T-Deck Plus/Pro pinout differences are either ruled out or split into separate board targets; flash/smoke Beads reference the confirmed revision.
